description_long: This is a medium-sized cylindrical bottle with a rounded shoulder and a white label wrapped around its midsection. The bottle is made of a translucent brown material, likely plastic or glass, and features a white screw cap with a peach-colored dropper top. The front label displays the product name 'COMPOSTO FORTE DDJ' along with additional text in smaller fonts. The bottle's silhouette is smooth and uniform, with a gentle taper toward the neck. There are no visible decorative graphics or patterns aside from the printed label, giving it a clean and utilitarian appearance.
description: A cylindrical brown bottle with a white label and a white screw cap topped by a peach dropper. The front label displays product information in a clean, minimal style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with 'COMPOSTO FORTE DDJ' and other text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the plain white label visible, no text or graphics present.
description_view_2: Side view showing the blank portion of the label, with the cap and dropper visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, showing the blank label and bottle shape.
